tagline: Handmade with love, care, and grace
heroTitle: Beautiful handmade pieces made for everyday life and special moments.
heroText: Welcome to Creating Grace Co. — a handmade shop for custom sewing creations, thoughtful gifts, and unique pieces made with care.
aboutText: Creating Grace Co. is built around handmade creativity, thoughtful detail, and pieces that feel personal. Every item is made with attention, patience, and care.
